scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web:wait"
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../web && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.test: cd server && npm run test:all && cd ../web && npm run test:exports
scripts.test:e2e: cd server && npm run test:repair-db && cd .. && playwright test
